name: xauusd_bb_rsi_mean_reversion_m15
hypothesis: On XAUUSD M15, simultaneous BB(20,2.0) band excursion and RSI(7) extreme reading mark short-term liquidity flushes that mean-revert to the middle band, especially when BB width is elevated but not in a trend regime.

entry_rules.long: Prior bar close < lower BB AND RSI(7) < 10; current bar closes back above lower BB; regime_filter passes; session active.
entry_rules.short: Prior bar close > upper BB AND RSI(7) > 90; current bar closes back below upper BB.

exit_rules.take_profit: middle BB (SMA20) primary; scale 50% at midline, remainder targets opposite band
exit_rules.trailing: none before midline; after midline tag, trail by 1.0*ATR(14)

falsifiable_conditions: Reject if any of (PF<2.0, Sharpe<1.5, MaxDD>15%, trades<200), or if performance in high-ADX regime exceeds low-ADX regime (thesis would be inverted).
notes: Ported idea from MIT-licensed mean-reversion-mql5; adapted to XAUUSD M15 with regime gate.
